summary: Completed backend-only testing of Finanzas Gerenciales Odoo Decoupling. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). All financial modules (dashboard_financiero, finanzas_gerencial, reportes_gerenciales) work WITHOUT direct Odoo schema reads.

odoo_decoupling_verification.GET /api/dashboard-financiero: PASS - Works without Odoo views, returns all expected fields (saldo_caja/banco, ingresos_confirmados, cobranzas_reales, flujo_neto, ventas stats, CxC/CxP totals, ingresos_por_marca, aging)
odoo_decoupling_verification.GET /api/rentabilidad (dimension=linea_n: PASS - Works without Odoo views, uses cont_venta_pos_linea.odoo_linea_negocio_id for mapping
odoo_decoupling_verification.GET /api/reportes/resumen-ejecutivo: PASS - Works without Odoo views, flujo_caja_mtd from treasury
odoo_decoupling_verification.GET /api/reportes/exportar/rentabilidad: PASS - Returns CSV with correct columns

linea_negocio_mapping.GET /api/lineas-negocio: PASS - Returns catalog with odoo_linea_negocio_id and odoo_linea_negocio_nombre columns
linea_negocio_mapping.cont_linea_negocio catalog: VERIFIED - Has 3 entries for empresa 6: Línea Principal (odoo_id=1), Línea Secundaria, SIN CLASIFICAR
linea_negocio_mapping.SIN CLASIFICAR fallback: VERIFIED - Auto-created when mapping unmapped lines (id=9)

treasury_integration.GET /api/flujo-caja-gerencial: PASS - Returns source='tesoreria', uses cont_movimiento_tesoreria as single source of truth

cxc_abono_prorrateo.POST /api/cxc/{cxc_id}/abonos: PASS - Creates treasury movement with origen_tipo='cobranza_cxc'
cxc_abono_prorrateo.Prorated logic: VERIFIED in code - When CxC has POS with multiple lineas, distributes abono proportionally by price_subtotal

cont_venta_pos_linea_columns.odoo_linea_negocio_id: VERIFIED - Column exists via dashboard-financiero query
cont_venta_pos_linea_columns.odoo_linea_negocio_nombre: VERIFIED - Column exists (added in database.py migration)

no_odoo_schema_references.dashboard_financiero.py: VERIFIED - No odoo.v_pos_line_full or odoo.v_pos_order_enriched references
no_odoo_schema_references.finanzas_gerencial.py: VERIFIED - No direct Odoo schema references
no_odoo_schema_references.reportes_gerenciales.py: VERIFIED - No direct Odoo schema references

critical_code_review_comments: Code review PASS: Financial modules read from cont_venta_pos, cont_venta_pos_linea, cont_venta_pos_estado (finanzas2 schema) not Odoo views
linea_mapping.py correctly maps odoo_linea_negocio_id to cont_linea_negocio.id with SIN CLASIFICAR fallback
Prorated abono in cxc_cxp.py lines 267-294 correctly distributes payment across lineas based on price_subtotal proportion

test_data_observed.treasury_movements_created: Abono on CxC #15 created treasury movement id=6 with origen_tipo='cobranza_cxc'

odoo_decoupling_confirmed.dashboard_financiero.py: Reads from cont_venta_pos, cont_venta_pos_estado, cont_venta_pos_linea, cont_movimiento_tesoreria
odoo_decoupling_confirmed.reportes_gerenciales.py: Reads from cont_venta_pos_linea for rentabilidad export
odoo_decoupling_confirmed.linea_mapping.py: Maps odoo_linea_negocio_id from cont_linea_negocio, NOT from Odoo schema

prorated_abono_logic.mechanism: When CxC linked to POS order with multiple lineas, distributes payment proportionally to price_subtotal per linea
prorated_abono_logic.fallback: If no POS detail or single linea, creates single treasury movement

architecture_verification.data_flow: Odoo POS data synced to cont_venta_pos/cont_venta_pos_linea with odoo_linea_negocio_id column -> Financial reports read local tables -> Treasury is single source of truth for cash flow

seed_data_creation: Created test CxC #15 (S/1000) and 2 abonos (S/500 each) -> now cobrada. Treasury movement id=6 created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finanzas Gerenciales Odoo Decoupling verified. Financial modules use local finanzas2 tables (cont_venta_pos, cont_venta_pos_linea with odoo_linea_negocio_id column). cont_linea_negocio is the official catalog with odoo_linea_negocio_id/nombre mapping columns. SIN CLASIFICAR fallback works. Prorated CxC abono creates multiple treasury movements when POS has multiple business lines. Note: ventas_pos.py still reads from odoo.v_pos_order_enriched for sync but this is expected - only financial/gerenciales modules needed decoupling.
